Quiz.name: The Laws of Motion
Quiz.description: Test your knowledge about Newton's three laws of motion and their applications.

Quiz.name: The Solar System
Quiz.description: How well do you know our planetary neighbors? Take this quiz and find out.

Quiz.name: Elements and Compounds
Quiz.description: Identify various elements, compounds, and their chemical properties.

Quiz.name: Electricity Basics
Quiz.description: Understand the core concepts of current, voltage, and resistance.

Quiz.name: Human Anatomy
Quiz.description: Explore the structure and functions of the human body systems.

Quiz.name: The History of Computers
Quiz.description: Trace the evolution of computers from early machines to modern devices.

Quiz.name: Photosynthesis
Quiz.description: Learn how plants convert sunlight into chemical energy.

Quiz.name: Climate and Weather
Quiz.description: Understand how climate systems shape our planet's weather patterns.

Quiz.name: The Atom
Quiz.description: Dive deep into the structure and behavior of atoms and subatomic particles.

Quiz.name: Waves and Sound
Quiz.description: Learn how sound travels through different media and the science of waves.

Quiz.name: Forces and Energy
Quiz.description: Explore how forces interact and how energy is transferred in systems.

Quiz.name: Space Exploration
Quiz.description: Discover key milestones in humanity’s journey into space.

Quiz.name: The Periodic Table
Quiz.description: Match elements to their properties and atomic numbers.

Quiz.name: Light and Optics
Quiz.description: Understand reflection, refraction, and how lenses work.

Quiz.name: Evolution and Genetics
Quiz.description: Test your understanding of heredity and evolutionary theory.

Quiz.name: Rocks and Minerals
Quiz.description: Identify different rock types and how they form.

Quiz.name: Oceanography
Quiz.description: Dive into the mysteries of Earth’s oceans and marine life.

Quiz.name: Artificial Intelligence
Quiz.description: Explore the basics of AI, machine learning, and their real-world applications.

Quiz.name: Quantum Mechanics
Quiz.description: Challenge your understanding of quantum phenomena and uncertainty.

Quiz.name: Ecology and Environment
Quiz.description: Learn how ecosystems function and how humans impact them.

Quiz.name: The Human Brain
Quiz.description: Test your knowledge about brain anatomy and neural functions.

Quiz.name: Renewable Energy
Quiz.description: Discover the science behind solar, wind, and hydroelectric energy.

Quiz.name: Astronomy 101
Quiz.description: Explore constellations, galaxies, and the expanding universe.

Quiz.name: Nuclear Physics
Quiz.description: Understand nuclear fission, fusion, and their role in energy production.

Scientist.name: Albert Einstein
Scientist.description: Developed the theory of relativity, changing our understanding of time, space, and energy.

Scientist.name: Isaac Newton
Scientist.description: Formulated the laws of motion and universal gravitation.

Scientist.name: Marie Curie
Scientist.description: Pioneer in radioactivity; first person to win two Nobel Prizes in different sciences.

Scientist.name: Charles Darwin
Scientist.description: Proposed the theory of evolution by natural selection.

Scientist.name: Nikola Tesla
Scientist.description: Inventor and engineer known for contributions to alternating current (AC) electrical systems.

Scientist.name: Galileo Galilei
Scientist.description: Father of modern observational astronomy and experimental physics.

Scientist.name: Stephen Hawking
Scientist.description: Theoretical physicist known for his work on black holes and cosmology.

Scientist.name: Ada Lovelace
Scientist.description: Recognized as the first computer programmer for her work on Charles Babbage’s Analytical Engine.

Scientist.name: Dmitri Mendeleev
Scientist.description: Created the Periodic Table of Elements, organizing chemical elements by their properties.

Scientist.name: Rosalind Franklin
Scientist.description: Her X-ray diffraction images were critical in discovering the DNA double helix structure.

Scientist.name: Michael Faraday
Scientist.description: Discovered electromagnetic induction and principles underlying electric motors and transformers.

Scientist.name: Gregor Mendel
Scientist.description: Father of genetics; discovered the fundamental laws of inheritance through pea plant experiments.

Scientist.name: Niels Bohr
Scientist.description: Developed the Bohr model of the atom and contributed to quantum theory.

Scientist.name: James Clerk Maxwell
Scientist.description: Formulated the classical theory of electromagnetic radiation.

Scientist.name: Richard Feynman
Scientist.description: Known for his work in quantum mechanics and quantum electrodynamics.

Scientist.name: Carl Sagan
Scientist.description: Astronomer and science communicator who popularized science through books and TV.
